'''''Talon''''' was an [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It accompanied the cruiser [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] on a number of occasions, at times when ''Liberty'' was not operating alone.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
